events.name: GeofenceEvaluated
events.dispatch_mode: sync (fires immediately after INSERT, before evaluate() returns)
events.trigger: GeofenceService::evaluate() persisted a row (any leaf: INSIDE / OUTSIDE / SKIPPED / ERROR).

payload.check: GeofenceCheck (persisted model instance) — carries fenceable_type + fenceable_id + subject_type + subject_id
payload.input: EvaluateGeofenceData (originating DTO) — carries fenceable_type + fenceable_id + lat + lng + accuracy_m + subject_type + subject_id

consumer_filter_patterns: Filter by $event->input->subjectType matching your module's registered subject alias (WHY the check ran).
Filter by $event->input->fenceableType when your listener only cares about specific fenced entity kinds (e.g. only 'branch' fences).

events.name: GeofenceOverrideApplied
events.trigger: ApplyGeofenceOverrideOnApproval listener minted a new INSIDE row with supersedes_check_id set. New row keeps the ORIGINAL row's fenceable_type + fenceable_id.

events.name: GeofenceOverrideRejected
events.trigger: Approval task closed with reject decision.

events.name: GeofenceCheckCreated
events.trigger: Eloquent created event on GeofenceCheck. Coarser signal than GeofenceEvaluated — fires for override rows too. Used for cache invalidation.

events.name: GeofenceCheckUpdated
events.trigger: Never dispatched under normal operation (immutability guard). Reserved for platform admin retention-purge edits.

events.name: GeofenceCheckDeleted
events.trigger: Soft-delete via SoftDeletes trait — GDPR retention path.

events.name: FenceableGeometryUpdated
events.trigger: The HasGeofence trait's boot hook detected an update to any of the 5 fence columns on a Geofenceable model. Fires from the consumer's model save().
